title: Hemorrhoids
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Hemorrhoids are swollen veins in or around the anus or lower rectum.
Self-care may include avoiding straining, using gentle hygiene, warm sitz baths, fiber, fluids, and clinician-recommended medicines.
Persistent symptoms, worsening pain, or significant bleeding need follow-up or urgent evaluation.
